# Play Central Games — LLM Index
# https://playcentralgames.com/llms.txt

## About

Play Central Games is an independent game studio that makes fun, accessible
games for families and casual players. Our flagship product is Bunny Warren,
a strategic family card game, available both as a physical product and as a
free browser game. We also publish Slingshot Carnival, a pixel-art arcade
game playable in the browser.

## Pages

- Homepage: https://playcentralgames.com
  A landing page for Play Central Games introducing Bunny Warren and the
  studio's other titles, with links to play online and purchase the physical
  card game.

- Bunny Warren (play online): https://playcentralgames.com/game
  A browser-based implementation of Bunny Warren, a strategic card game for
  2–4 players. Visitors can play for free against an AI opponent directly in
  the browser with no download or account required.

- Slingshot Carnival: https://playcentralgames.com/slingshot-carnival
  A pixel-art arcade browser game built with Three.js. Players use a slingshot
  mechanic to hit targets (birds, balloons, UFOs, fruits, coins) across
  multiple levels, with an upgrade system between rounds.

## Products

- **Bunny Warren** — Physical card game, 2–4 players, suitable for ages 7+.
  A strategic set-collection game with a warren-building theme. Available via
  Amazon and iExploreArt.

## Contact & Social

- Instagram: @playcentralgames
- Purchase: https://playcentralgames.com/#buy

## Sitemap

https://playcentralgames.com/sitemap.xml
